utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates – provided as '2024-09-15 to 2024-09-19' (fully specified).
3. transportation – includes detailed flight info (airline, airports, dates, class, baggage, price, currency) → fully specified.
4. accommodation – includes hotel name, type, location, room type, price per night, nights, total cost, currency, amenities → fully specified.
5. activities – includes name(s) of activities, duration, difficulty, equipment, guide, cost, currency → fully specified.
6. additional_services – includes meals_estimate with currency, though minimal, it counts as specified.
7. total_budget – includes itemized cost breakdown and total cost → fully specified.
All 7 required items are present and fully detailed.
